name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator

TypeOK == /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted", "committed"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborted", "committed"}

Init == /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ coordinator = "idle"

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "idle"
          /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = "preparing"
           /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "idle"
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "prepared" \forall i \in 1..N]
           /\ coordinator' = "preparing"

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = "preparing"
          /\ \E i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "idle"
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "aborted" \forall i \in 1..N]
          /\ coordinator' = "aborted"

Commit == /\ coordinator = "preparing"
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"
          /\ coordinator' = "committing"
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

Abort == /\ coordinator = "preparing"
         /\ \E i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "aborted"
         /\ coordinator' = "aborted"
         /\ UNCHANGED participants

FinalizeCommit == /\ coordinator = "committing"
                  /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"
                  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "committed" \forall i \in 1..N]
                  /\ coordinator' = "committed"

FinalizeAbort == /\ coordinator = "aborted"
                /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "aborted"
                /\ coordinator' = "aborted"
                /\ UNCHANGED participants

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort \/ FinalizeCommit \/ FinalizeAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

CanEat(i) == forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ TakeForks(i)
        \/ \E i \in 0..N-1:
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED num
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num[i] > 0
              /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] <= num[i]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
    /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = 0
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor = 1
              /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers <= N - 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers >= 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers = 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ writer_active = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan

(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (p,q) *)
ASSUME
  Proc = 1..N
  Chan = { <<p,q>> \in Proc \times Proc : p # q }

(* State of each process: local counter *)
VARIABLES procState, chanState, markerReceived
(* State of each channel: sequence of messages (integers) *)
(* Marker received flag for each process: FALSE until marker received *)

vars == <<procState, chanState, markerReceived>>

(* Initial state: all counters 0, channels empty, no markers received *)
Init == /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerReceived = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

(* Process p sends a message (its counter) to q *)
SendMsg(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<p, q>> IN
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = @ + 1]
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(@, procState[p])]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<markerReceived>>

(* Process p receives a message from q *)
RecvMsg(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<q, p>> IN
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(@)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerReceived>>

(* Process p records its state and sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
RecordState(p) ==
  LET outgoing == { c \in Chan : First(c) = p } IN
  /\ procState' = procState
  /\ chanState' = chanState
  /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ \E q \in Proc : q # p /\ SendMarker(p, q)

(* Send a marker from p to q *)
SendMarker(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<p, q>> IN
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(@, "marker")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerReceived>>

(* Receive a marker on channel c = <<q, p>> *)
RecvMarker(p, q) ==
  LET c == <<q, p>> IN
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(@)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerReceived>>

(* Next-state relation: any process can send/receive a message or marker *)
Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc : p # q :
    \/ SendMsg(p, q)
    \/ RecvMsg(p, q)
    \/ RecvMarker(p, q)
    \/ RecordState(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

(* Invariant: all channels contain only integers or "marker" *)
TypeOK == /\ procState \in [Proc -> Nat]
          /\ chanState \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat \cup {"marker"})]
          /\ markerReceived \in [Proc -> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

(* State of each node: "idle" or "sending" *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "sending"}]

(* Initially, node 1 holds the token and all nodes are idle *)
Init == token = 1 /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Node i can send a message only if it holds the token *)
Send(i) == token = i /\ state[i] = "idle" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "sending"]

(* After sending, the token passes to the next node *)
Pass(i) == state[i] = "sending" /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: Send(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: Pass(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

KeysVal == 1..Keys
ValuesVal == 1..Values

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in KeysVal |-> 0]

Next == \E k \in KeysVal : \E v \in ValuesVal :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v] /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
  /\ chosen \in Nat

Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) ==
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot']]

Promise(p) ==
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Accept(p) ==
  /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
  /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
  /\ UNCHANGED <<chosen>>
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot, value |-> proposers[p].value]]

Chosen(v) ==
  /\ chosen' = v
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M: Promise(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M: Accept(p)
  \/ \E v \in Nat: Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackIndex, channel, channelContent, chunkIndex, file, receiverState, retries, senderState

TypeOK == 
    senderState \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "finished"} /\
    receiverState \in {"idle", "receiving", "finished"} /\
    file \in Seq(1..N) /\
    chunkIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    ackIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    retries \in 0..MAX_RETRIES /\
    channel \in {"empty", "chunk", "ack"} /\
    channelContent \in 1..N

Init == 
    /\ senderState = "idle"
    /\ receiverState = "idle"
    /\ file = CHOOSE f \in Seq(1..N) : TRUE
    /\ chunkIndex = 0
    /\ ackIndex = 0
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ channel = "empty"
    /\ channelContent \in 1..N

SendChunk == 
    /\ senderState = "sending"
    /\ channel = "empty"
    /\ channelContent = file[chunkIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "chunk"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retries>>

ReceiveChunk == 
    /\ channel = "chunk"
    /\ receiverState = "receiving"
    /\ channelContent = file[chunkIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "empty"
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, ackIndex, retries>>

SendAck == 
    /\ channel = "empty"
    /\ channelContent = file[ackIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "ack"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, retries>>

ReceiveAck == 
    /\ channel = "ack"
    /\ receiverState = "receiving"
    /\ channelContent = file[ackIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "empty"
    /\ ackIndex' = ackIndex + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, retries>>

Retransmit == 
    /\ channel = "empty"
    /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelContent = file[chunkIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "chunk"
    /\ retries' = retries + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex>>

GiveUp == 
    /\ channel = "empty"
    /\ retries = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelContent = file[chunkIndex + 1]
    /\ channel' = "chunk"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retries>>

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveChunk
    \/ SendAck
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retries, channel, channelContent>>
====
